channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Hidden rule behind cosmic rays discovered after 100 years
item.description: Scientists studying ultra-powerful cosmic rays have found a hidden pattern that may explain the origins of these mysterious particles.

item.title: NSF launches $1.5B X-Labs initiative for breakthrough science
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation announced a $1.5 billion, decade-long initiative called NSF X-Labs to address major scientific challenges.

item.title: Giant 'stealth' magma surge triggered thousands of earthquakes beneath Atlantic island
item.description: Deep beneath Portugal's São Jorge Island, a massive magma surge silently rose from over 20 kilometers underground in 2022, causing thousands of earthquakes.

item.title: Paleontology rocked by discovery of organic molecules in 66-million-year-old dinosaur bones
item.description: Scientists have found strong evidence that dinosaur fossils may still contain traces of their original proteins, challenging long-held beliefs.
